form.formComment: Returns from a 37-day let-up. Last start led to the turn then faded 14th of 16 at Wingatui in the LR Dunedin Gold Cup on February 28 over 2400m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Noble Knight carrying 53kg at $50. The start before that won by 1.3 len at Ashburton February 20 over 2200m in soft going defeating Iffididit with 55kg at $15.70. Unlikely to trouble this field.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 13 at Riccarton Park on March 21 over 1800m, 2 len behind Royal Valour with 53kg at $42.30. The run before that 6th of 9 at Riccarton Park on March 4 over 2000m, on a wet track; 1.1 len behind Cognoscenti carrying 59.5kg at $12.70. Encouraging effort last start. This looks a nice assignment so expect a lot more.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 5th of 10 at Wingatui on March 15 over 2200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Caffeinated carrying 59kg at $18.80. Previously second-up made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 9 at Ascot Park on November 23 over 2200m, on a slow track; 1.0 len behind Short with 58kg at $8. Has won second up before and looks a definite top-three hope.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Most recently sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 16 at Wingatui in the LR Dunedin Gold Cup on February 28 over 2400m, on a slow track; 2.25 len behind Noble Knight with 53.5kg at $39.20. The race before that raced on the pace when 2nd of 10 at Wingatui on February 7 over 2200m, on a slow track; 1.2 len behind In Vegas with 54kg at $11.40. Going well. Has ability and is one of the chances.
